◎简　　介  

　　When a best-selling author decides to escape the media frenzy, her plan goes awry when a she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. Found wandering with no memory and no ID, the town doctor (and a single dad) offers up his guest house until her memory returns. But as she blends seamlessly into their family life, she must decide if the life she's been living is the life...
